— What I Do

SERVICES

01
YouTube & Long-Form

Clean, engaging cuts for YouTubers and podcasters. Pacing, captions, b-roll — everything you need to grow your channel.

02
Reels & Short Videos

Punchy, scroll-stopping content for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. Trend-aware editing that drives real engagement.

03
Brand & Ad Films

Commercial-grade editing for products, events, and brand stories. Professional color grading and audio mixing included.

04
Color Grading

Cinematic look development for any genre — documentary, corporate, or lifestyle. Consistent, professional color from start to finish.

05
Motion Graphics

Custom lower thirds, animated titles, transitions, and intros using After Effects & Premiere Pro for fast, polished results.

06
Rush Delivery

24–48 hour turnaround available for time-sensitive projects. Quality never compromised, deadline always met.

About Me

EDITOR.
STORYTELLER.

Hey, I'm Rafey — a freelance video editor based in Faisalabad, Pakistan. I specialize in crafting visual stories that connect with audiences and drive results for brands and creators worldwide.

With 3 years of client experience, I've worked on everything from fast-paced social content to cinematic brand films. Clean edits, clear communication, and always on time.
